text: Company policies now accessible from any screen via footer links
New hire onboarding: guided profile setup and policy acknowledgments
Deal Flow: track BD pipeline from qualifying to contracted
Location on profiles: share your current city with the team
Reimbursements: upload separately from invoices in your profile
Home dashboard now available to all employees
Analytics: LinkedIn performance insights per client
Invoice Center: monthly upload tracking with reminders
Personalized Home greeting by time of day
Leave approvals: recent history with expandable view
Reportee leave balances: total remaining, own team first
Home dashboard with team stats and timeline
Email notifications when someone comments/likes your request
Bugs & Features board with upvotes, replies, and status tracking
Daily task archive with calendar view
